question: What are the departments at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET has 8 departments: 1. Applied Sciences and Humanities, 2. Biotechnology, 3. Civil Engineering, 4. Computer Science and Applications (CSA/MCA), 5. Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), 6. Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE), 7. Electrical Engineering (EE), 8. Mechanical Engineering (ME). For further details Please vist: https://gbpiet.ac.in/departments/

question: What undergraduate courses are offered at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET offers B.Tech in 8 disciplines: 1. Civil Engineering, 2. Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), 3. Computer Science and Applications (CSA), 4. Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE), 5. Electrical Engineering (EE), 6. Mechanical Engineering (ME), 7. Biotechnology, 8. Applied Sciences and Humanities. All programs are AICTE approved and UGC recognized.

question: What are the B.Tech branches at GBPIET?
answer: B.Tech Branches at GBPIET (60 seats each): 1. CSE (Computer Science and Engineering), 2. CSE with AI and ML specialization, 3. ECE (Electronics and Communication), 4. Mechanical Engineering, 5. Manufacturing Engineering, 6. Electrical Engineering, 7. Civil Engineering, 8. Biotechnology. All admissions through JEE Main and UKTECH counselling. For further details Please vist: https://gbpiet.ac.in/admission/

question: What is B.Tech CSE AI ML at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET offers B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering with specialization in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI and ML). Seats: 60. This is a modern program focusing on AI, ML, Deep Learning, and Data Science. Admission through JEE Main.

question: What postgraduate courses are offered at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET offers Postgraduate programs: M.Tech in CSE (18 seats), Digital Signal Processing (10 seats), Biotechnology (25 seats), Production Engineering (18 seats), Thermal Engineering (18 seats), Geotechnology (18 seats), Infrastructure (18 seats). MCA - Master of Computer Applications (60 seats). For further details Please vist : https://gbpiet.ac.in/academic-programmes/postgraduate/

question: Does GBPIET offer PhD programs?
answer: Yes! GBPIET offers PhD programs in Engineering and Science disciplines. Research is supported through QIP, Assistantship and industry sponsorship. Apply at: https://gbpiet.ac.in/academic-programmes/doctoral/

question: What is MCA program at GBPIET?
answer: MCA (Master of Computer Applications) at GBPIET is a 2-year postgraduate program with 60 seats. It is offered by the Department of Computer Science and Applications (CSA). HOD: Prof. Priti Dimri. Admission through UTUEE exam. For further details Please vist: https://gbpiet.ac.in/departments/computer-science-and-applications/

question: What is CSE department at GBPIET?
answer: Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) department at GBPIET offers B.Tech CSE (60 seats), B.Tech CSE AI and ML (60 seats), and M.Tech CSE (18 seats). HOD: Dr. Bhumika Gupta. For further details Please vist: https://gbpiet.ac.in/departments/computer-science-engineering/

question: What is ECE department at GBPIET?
answer: Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) department at GBPIET offers B.Tech ECE (60 seats) and M.Tech DSP (10 seats). HOD: Dr. Mahesh Kr. Agarwal. For further details Please vist: https://gbpiet.ac.in/departments/electronics-and-communication-engineering/

question: What is Mechanical Engineering at GBPIET?
answer: Mechanical Engineering (ME) department at GBPIET offers B.Tech ME (60 seats), B.Tech Manufacturing Engineering (60 seats), M.Tech Production Engineering (18 seats), and M.Tech Thermal Engineering (18 seats). HOD: Prof. K.K.S. Mer. For further details Please vist: https://gbpiet.ac.in/departments/mechanical-engineering/

question: What is Civil Engineering at GBPIET?
answer: Civil Engineering department at GBPIET offers B.Tech Civil (60 seats), M.Tech Geotechnology (18 seats), and M.Tech Infrastructure (18 seats). HOD: Dr. B.S. Khati. For further details Please vist: https://gbpiet.ac.in/departments/civil-engineering/

question: What is Biotechnology at GBPIET?
answer: Biotechnology department at GBPIET offers B.Tech Biotechnology (60 seats) and M.Tech Biotechnology (25 seats). HOD: Dr. Arun Bhatt. For further details Please vist: https://gbpiet.ac.in/departments/biotechnology/

question: What is Electrical Engineering at GBPIET?
answer: Electrical Engineering (EE) department at GBPIET offers B.Tech Electrical Engineering (60 seats). HOD: Prof. Sanjay Gairola. For further details Please vist: https://gbpiet.ac.in/departments/electrical-engineering/

question: Does GBPIET offer PhD programs?
answer: Yes! GBPIET offers Doctoral (PhD) programs in various Engineering and Science disciplines. The programme focuses on advanced research, innovation, and academic excellence. Admission is through a written test and interview. For further details Please vist: https://gbpiet.ac.in/academic-programmes/doctoral/

question: What is the admission process for PhD at GBPIET?
answer: PhD admission at GBPIET is conducted through a written test followed by an interview. Candidates must have a Master's degree in a relevant field with required marks as per institute norms. For further details Please vist: https://gbpiet.ac.in/academic-programmes/doctoral/

question: What are the research areas in PhD at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET PhD research areas include: Computer Science (Mobile Computing, Image Processing, Adhoc Networking), Electronics and Communication (Solid State Devices, Microstrip Antenna, Signal Processing), Biotechnology (Genetics, Molecular Biology, Plant Biotechnology), and Applied Sciences (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry).

question: What facilities are available for PhD students at GBPIET?
answer: PhD students at GBPIET get access to advanced laboratories, research facilities, experienced faculty guidance, industry collaborations, and opportunities for research publications and projects.

question: Does GBPIET provide support for PhD research?
answer: Yes, GBPIET supports PhD research through assistantships, QIP programs, funded research projects, and collaboration with industries and national organizations.
